payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No ambiguous entity in the input requires resolution.

payload.intent: Capture architecture preferences and open questions for Brain memory system.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.

relationships.object: rebuildable semantic projection from Brain DB
relationships.subject: Cognee

memory_cards.statement: Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the primary memory store.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
Whether Telegram should be added later is unresolved.
Which model is cheapest while still saturating performance is unresolved.

repair_options: Add a durable memory for Telegram integration criteria once decided.
Add a durable memory for model selection once benchmark or cost data is available.
